item.title: Caracals may hiss at their owners as a form of communication or to express discomfort. This behavior can arise from fear or a need to establish boundaries. Unlike domesticated cats, caracals have different social instincts, which can lead to unpredictable

item.title: So much love in one little video. ❤️ Everyone has met. Although Lt. Dan took things slow with Poppy and Deckster, she fully trusts them now and loves their snuggles! But… the first person she looks for when she’s done… Jenny. ❤️ Love those little besties.
item.description: By @soccercatmom: So much love in one little video. ❤️ Everyone has met. Although Lt. Dan took things slow with Poppy and Deckster, she fully trusts them now and loves their snuggles! But… the first person she looks for when she’s done… Jenny. ❤️ Love those little besties.
